description_long: This is a round ceramic cup with a wide opening and a single, sturdy handle. The exterior is adorned with a vibrant botanical pattern featuring green leaves, white veins, orange geometric flower shapes, and a large pink blossom, all set against a white background. The handle is solid green and smoothly integrated into the cup's body. The interior of the cup is a soft, matte pink, providing a gentle contrast to the lively exterior. The cup's surface appears smooth and matte, with no visible gloss or shine. There are no visible logos, branding, or text, and the cup does not have a lid.
description: A round ceramic cup with a green handle, decorated with colorful botanical patterns and a pink interior. The surface is smooth and matte, with no lid or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green handle on the right and a prominent orange and white floral motif with green stripes.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered, displaying overlapping green leaves, brown accents, and partial floral patterns.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the large pink flower and green leaf motif, with the handle on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a large green leaf with white veins, no handle visible.
